# Stockli

> Pakistan-focused investing workspace for PSX prices, portfolios, mutual funds, ETFs, and market tools.

- Site: https://mystockli.com
- Sitemap: https://mystockli.com/sitemap.xml
- Contact: seemakram15@gmail.com

## Public pages

- / — product landing
- /market — PSX market board
- /market/sectors — sector performance
- /market/mutual-funds — MUFAP mutual funds
- /market/etfs — Pakistan ETFs
- /market/fipi-lipi — foreign and local investor flows
- /stock/{SYMBOL} — PSX share price and fundamentals
- /news — Pakistan market news
- /analysis/fundamentals — stock fundamentals explorer
- /analysis/stock-analyzer — stock analyzer
- /analysis/prediction — next-session PSX outlook
- /analysis/portfolio-suggestions — portfolio ideas
- /analysis/pivot-points — pivot levels
- /explore/board-meetings — board meetings calendar
- /explore/book-closures — book closures
- /explore/dividend-history — dividend history
- /explore/useful-links — investor resources
- /youtubers — PSX YouTube channels

## Private (not for indexing)

Dashboard, portfolios, watchlists, alerts, account, admin, auth flows, and private APIs.
